title: Field Service Management Syste
description: Build a field service system in NocoBase for tickets, dispatching, and SLA tracking, with AI employees summarizing work orders and service reports.
description_cn: 围绕报修、派工和服务时限搭建 NocoBase 现场服务系统，AI 员工整理工单并生成运营复盘。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build an application with NocoBase — Field Service Management System: work order dispatching, technician scheduling, service deadline tracking, spare parts suggestions, and AI work order operations analysis. Use this prototype as the layout and signature visual reference: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/60-field-service-management-system.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 现场服务管理系统:工单派发、人员调度、服务时限跟踪、备件建议和 AI 工单运营分析。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/60-field-service-management-system.html
featureList:
Work order dispatching
Technician scheduling
Service deadline tracking
Spare parts suggestions
AI work order operations analysis
about:
field service management syste
Operations
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
